tweets.topic: Jio, Airtel, Vi, BSNL Prepaid Plans Price Hike - New Rates Explained
tweets.tweet: Jio, Airtel, and Vi have hiked prepaid plans by 12-25% with rates now starting from ₹155-₹199 for 28-day plans, while BSNL keeps it affordable at ₹99. Good news is you get more validity and data, but yeah, our phone bills just got heavier! #TelecomNews #PrepaidPlans

tweets.topic: Reliance Jio and Bank of Baroda Launch Mobile Banking App for JioPhone Prima 4G
tweets.tweet: Reliance Jio & Bank of Baroda just dropped a mobile banking app exclusively for JioPhone Prima 4G, making digital banking accessible to feature phone users. Now your ₹3,349 phone can handle UPI, transfers, and loans without needing a smartphone upgrade. #JioPhone #DigitalIndia

tweets.topic: HBO Max Launches in India via JioHotstar - Pricing and Details
tweets.tweet: HBO Max just launched in India through JioCinema at ₹99/month for ad-supported and ₹299/month ad-free! This means Indian streamers finally get Game of Thrones, Dune, and DC stuff without juggling multiple apps. #StreamingWars #JioCinema

tweets.topic: Airtel Deploys 3,400 New 5G Sites in Maharashtra and Goa
tweets.tweet: Airtel just switched on 3,400 fresh 5G sites across Maharashtra and Goa, bringing next-gen speeds to over 2 crore people. So basically, your Instagram reels are about to load faster than your neighbor's WiFi—finally some good news for our internet dreams! #5G #Airtel

tweets.topic: vivo X300 Ultra and X300 FE India Launch Announced
tweets.tweet: Vivo just announced the X300 Ultra and X300 FE for India with the Ultra packing a 50MP periscope camera and starting at ₹84,999. Budget gamers and camera enthusiasts finally have some serious competition this season! #VivoX300 #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Oppo Find X9s and Find X9 Ultra to Launch in India in May
tweets.tweet: Oppo's Find X9s and X9 Ultra flagships are landing in India this May with cutting-edge imaging tech and premium specs. Finally, we'll get to experience Oppo's latest innovation without waiting for global rollouts! #OppoFind #TechLaunch

tweets.topic: OnePlus Ace 6 Ultra Metal Storm Colour Revealed - Launch April 28
tweets.tweet: OnePlus Ace 6 Ultra's stunning Metal Storm color drops on April 28 with its signature sleek gray finish and premium build quality. If you've been waiting for that perfect phone aesthetic, this one's giving flagship vibes without burning a hole in your pocket. #OnePlus #TechLaunch

tweets.topic: Motorola Edge 70 Pro Launched at ₹36,999 with Sony LYTIA 710 Camera
tweets.tweet: Motorola Edge 70 Pro just dropped at ₹36,999 with Sony's LYTIA 710 camera sensor for crisp shots in any light. Finally a mid-range phone that doesn't compromise on photography — your Instagram feed called, it's ready! #MotorolaEdge70Pro #IndianTech

tweets.topic: RBI Orders Bank Compensation for Digital Arrest Scam Victims
tweets.tweet: RBI has ordered banks to compensate victims of digital arrest scams with full refunds of stolen amounts. This means if you fell for those fake cop calls, your money's coming back — finally some real justice in the digital world! #RBIAction #DigitalSafety

tweets.topic: PNB Partners Kiwi to Launch Credit-Enabled UPI for Users
tweets.tweet: PNB has partnered with Kiwi to launch credit-enabled UPI, letting you borrow up to ₹1 lakh instantly for payments without separate app switching. Your daily UPI shopping just got a credit card vibe—pay now, repay later with actual flexibility. #DigitalPayments #FinTech
